infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: MediTrack needs your location to share your GPS coordinates with emergency contacts in case of an SOS event.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: MediTrack uses biometric authentication to protect your sensitive health tracking records.

plugins.photosPermission: MediTrack needs photo access to let you upload prescriptions and symptom logs.
plugins.cameraPermission: MediTrack needs camera access to let you take photos of prescriptions and symptom details.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: MediTrack needs location access to share your GPS coordinates with emergency contacts in case of an SOS event.
